new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a568cd9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/filemanager/common/src/main/cpp/napi/n_error.h
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+#ifndef N_ERROR_H
+#define N_ERROR_H
+
+#include <string>
+
+class NError {
+public:
+    explicit NError(int errorCode) : code(errorCode) {}
+    
+    int getCode() const { return code; }
+    
+private:
+    int code;
+};
+
+#endif // N_ERROR_H
